creator: pgj@FreeBSD.org
text:
Update from 0.46 to 1.1.  It also includes and option for enabling syntax highlighting support (defaults to "off").  Take maintainership (requested by the actual maintainer).

NOTE: This update requires archivers/hs-zip-archive [1] and textproc/hs-highlighting-kate [2] to be committed.

[1] http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=129679
[2] http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=129690

Fix: Patch attached with submission follows:
